name: PHERECYDES PHARMA SADIR
summary: PHERECYDES PHARMA SADIR is a biotechnology company specializing in the development and production of bacteriophages for targeted antibacterial therapy. They aim to provide alternatives to antibiotics for treating bacterial infections; headquarters are located in Romainville, France. Pherecydes Pharma seeks to combat antibiotic resistance through its innovative phage therapy approach.
